design_decision: Promoted evidence must be replayable from the exported ZIP and surfaced through audit query packs with explicit artifact paths, digests, and trace/evidence correlation keys.

sources.claim: SLSA provenance is only useful if inspected/verified, and verification checks artifact digests against provenance subjects.
SLSA provenance tracks where, when, and how an artifact was produced.
OpenTelemetry correlation commonly binds logs/traces with trace_id and span_id as top-level fields.
OpenTelemetry traces are correlated with logs and metrics, supporting evidence linkage across signals.
